author: @HillBilly556
text:
I just need to take a second to say a massive THANK YOU to everyone from Nerdrotic. As one who has worked in film, tv, and theater, I can't tell you what a breath of fresh air it is to see a community of folks dedicated to iconic film and pop-culture content who don't settle for the force-fed drivel being shoveled out by Hollywood and the rest of the clown show.
Knowing that we've all just been gaslit in recent times and that it's not just me who noticed really does put a smile on my face.
Thanks again, keep producing awesome content and speaking truth out on the front of the war against 🤡 🌎.
